english translation text: Dua for last 10 Nights

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اللّهُمّ إِنّكَ قُلْتَ فِي كِتَابِكَ المُنْزَلِ​
english translation text: O Allah, You have said in Your revealed book,​

arabic text: شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ الّذِي أُنْزِلَ فِيهِ القُرْآنُ​
english translation text: the month of Ramadhan, in which the Qur’an​ was sent, ​

arabic text: هُدَىً لِلنَّاسِ وَبَيّنَاتٍ مِنَ الهُدَى وَالفُرْقَانِ​
english translation text: a guidance for humankind, and clear signs of guidance and distinction (2:185).​

arabic text: فَعَظّمْتَ حُرْمَةَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ ،بِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ مِنَ القُرْآنِ​
english translation text: So You have magnified the sanctity, of the month of Ramadhan, by revealing the Qur’an in it.​

arabic text: وَخَصَصْتَهُ بِلَيْلَةِ القَدْرِ، وَجَعَلْتَهَا خَيْراً مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ.​
english translation text: And You have made it special, by placing the night of Qadr in it, making it better than a thousand months.

arabic text: اللّهُمّ وَهذِهِ أَيَّامُ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ قَدِ انْقَضَتْ،​
english translation text: O Allah, and now, the days of Ramadhan are nearing completion,​

arabic text: وَلَيَالِيهِ قَدْ تَصَرّمَتْ،​
english translation text: and the nights are leaving us.​

arabic text: وَقَدْ صِرْتُ يَا إِلهِي مِنْهُ إِلَى مَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنّي​
english translation text: And You know better than me what status I have reached in this month,​

arabic text: وَأَحْصَى لِعَدَدِهِ مِنَ الخَلْقِ أَجْمَعِينَ،​
english translation text: for You alone can calculate it, from all of creation.

arabic text: فَأَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا سَأَلَكَ بِهِ مَلائِكَتُكَ المُقَرّبُونَ،
english translation text: So I ask You by what, the angels close to You, …

arabic text: وَأَنْبِيَاؤُكَ المُرْسَلُونَ، وَعِبَادُكَ الصَّالِحُونَ
english translation text: … Your sent Prophets, and Your virtuous servants, have asked.

arabic text: أَنْ تُصَلّيَ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
english translation text: That You bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

arabic text: وَأَنْ تَفُكّ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ النَّارِ، وَتُدْخِلَنِي الجَنّةَ برَحْمَتِكَ،
english translation text: and save me from the fire, and make me enter Heaven, by Your mercy.

arabic text: وَأَنْ تَتَفَضّلَ عَلَيّ بِعَفْوِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ،
english translation text: Favour me by Your forgiveness and grace,

arabic text: وَتَتَقَبّلَ تَقَرّبِي، وَتَسْتَجِيبَ دُعَائِي،
english translation text: accept my seeking nearness to You, and answer my prayer.

arabic text: وَتَمُنّ عَلَيّ بِالأَمْنِ يَوْمَ الخَوْفِ
english translation text: Grant me security on the day of fear,

arabic text: مِنْ كُلّ هَوْلٍ أَعْدَدْتَهُ لِيَوْمِ القِيَامَةِ.
english translation text: from every horror You have prepared for the Day of Judgement.

arabic text: إِلهِي وَأَعُوذُ بِوَجْهِكَ الكَرِيمِ،
english translation text: My God, I seek refuge with Your gracious self,

arabic text: وَبِجَلالِكَ العَظِيمِ
english translation text: and Your mighty power,

arabic text: أَنْ تَنْقَضِيَ أَيَّامُ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ وَلَيَالِيهِ
english translation text: from (such a state) that the days and nights of Ramadhan reach completion,

arabic text: وَلَكَ قِبَلِي تَبِعَةٌ أَوْ ذَنْبٌ تُؤَاخِذُنِي بِهِ،
english translation text: and there still remains a sin on me, that You will account me for,

arabic text: أَوْ خَطِيئَةٌ تُرِيدُ أَنْ تَقْتَصّهَا مِنّي لَمْ تَغْفِرْهَا لِي،
english translation text: or a mistake that You have not forgiven me.

arabic text: سَيّدِي سَيّدِي سَيّدِي،
english translation text: My Master, my Master, my Master,

arabic text: أَسْأَلُكَ يَا لا إِلهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
english translation text: I ask You, there is no god but You,

arabic text: إِذْ لا إِلهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
english translation text: for surely there is no god but You,

arabic text: إِنْ كُنْتَ رَضِيتَ عَنّي فِي هذَا الشّهْرِ، فَازْدَدْ عَنّي رِضَىً،
english translation text: if You are pleased with me in this month, then increase that pleasure.

arabic text: وَإِنْ لَمْ تَكُنْ رَضِيتَ عَنّي، فَمِنَ الآنَ فَارْضَ عَنّي
english translation text: And if You are not pleased with me then from now, be pleased with me.

arabic text: يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ،
english translation text: O the Most Merciful of all!

arabic text: يَا اللّهُ يَا أَحَدُ يَا صَمَدُ
english translation text: O Allah, O One, O Needless,

arabic text: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
english translation text: O He who does not give birth and was not born,

arabic text: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ.
english translation text: and there is none equal to Him.

arabic text: يَا مُلَيّنَ الحَدِيدِ لِدَاوُدَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the softener of iron for Dawud, peace be on him.

arabic text: يَا كَاشِفَ الضّرّ وَالكُرَبِ العِظَامِ عَنْ أَيّوبَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the remover of harm and distress from Ayyub, peace be on him.

arabic text: أَيْ مُفَرّجَ هَمّ يَعْقُوبَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the reliever of the grief of Ya`qub, peace be on him.

arabic text: أَيْ مُنَفّسَ غَمّ يُوسُفَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the comforter of the sorrow of Yusuf, peace be on him.

arabic text: صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
english translation text: Bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

arabic text: كَمَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ أَنْ تُصَلّيَ عَلَيْهِمْ أَجْمَعِينَ،
english translation text: the way it befits You to bless them all,

arabic text: وَافْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ،
english translation text: and deal with me in a manner which befits You,

arabic text: وَلا تَفْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنَا أَهْلُهُ.
english translation text: not in a manner which befits me.

arabic text: يَا مُلَيّنَ الحَدِيدِ لِدَاوُدَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the softener of iron for Dawud, peace be on him.

arabic text: يَا كَاشِفَ الضّرّ وَالكُرَبِ العِظَامِ عَنْ أَيّوبَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the remover of harm and distress from Ayyub, peace be on him.

arabic text: أَيْ مُفَرّجَ هَمّ يَعْقُوبَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the reliever of the grief of Ya`qub, peace be on him.

arabic text: أَيْ مُنَفّسَ غَمّ يُوسُفَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the comforter of the sorrow of Yusuf, peace be on him.

arabic text: صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
english translation text: Bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

arabic text: كَمَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ أَنْ تُصَلّيَ عَلَيْهِمْ أَجْمَعِينَ،
english translation text: the way it befits You to bless them all,

arabic text: وَافْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ،
english translation text: and deal with me in a manner which befits You,

arabic text: وَلا تَفْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنَا أَهْلُهُ.
english translation text: not in a manner which befits me.

arabic text: يَا مُلَيّنَ الحَدِيدِ لِدَاوُدَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the softener of iron for Dawud, peace be on him.

arabic text: يَا كَاشِفَ الضّرّ وَالكُرَبِ العِظَامِ عَنْ أَيّوبَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the remover of harm and distress from Ayyub, peace be on him.

arabic text: أَيْ مُفَرّجَ هَمّ يَعْقُوبَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the reliever of the grief of Ya`qub, peace be on him.

arabic text: أَيْ مُنَفّسَ غَمّ يُوسُفَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،
english translation text: O the comforter of the sorrow of Yusuf, peace be on him.

arabic text: صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
english translation text: Bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

arabic text: كَمَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ أَنْ تُصَلّيَ عَلَيْهِمْ أَجْمَعِينَ،
english translation text: the way it befits You to bless them all,

arabic text: وَافْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ،
english translation text: and deal with me in a manner which befits You,

arabic text: وَلا تَفْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنَا أَهْلُهُ.
english translation text: not in a manner which befits me.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
